titleStmt.title: SII 40.226: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 226. (A.R. No. B. 271 of 1933.) Dōkipaṟṟu, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone planted before the temple of Pōlēramma near the tank.
This is dated Śaka 1067, Uttarāyaṇa Saṅkrānti.

Registers the grant of a tank and some land made to the temple of Mahādēva at Dontipaṟu by Gandepu Sivvana, for the merit of the king. Further it records the gift of lands as brahmapuri to several brāhmaṇas, on the occasion of the consecration of the deity in the temple by the same donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kulōttuṁ
ggacōḍa goṁkkarājulaku nāyurā
rōgyabhivriddhigā sakavaruṣaṁbulu 1067
gunēṁṭi Uttarāyana saṁkrāṁti nimityamu
naṁ gaṁdepusivvana doṁti patti śrīmahādēvara
ku niṁdula ceṟu mahāvibali Accanalaku nā
caṁdrā¨rkkamugānicce I dēvara sthānapati nāgiśva
rapaṁḍitulaku mallikekuṁbeṭṭina velipolamu
kha 1 mrēkavāsi kha 1 maddelakētani kha 1 saṁkadeva kha 1
dēvi pa prōlani kha 1 vēnāyaku kha 1
Idēvara pratiṣṭanāḍiccina brahmāpuri pō
lamu sōmiśvarabhaṭla kha 3 prōliyabhaṭla kha 2
Appanabhaṭla kha 2 mēḍiyabhaṭla kha vitripurēśvaru
kha 2 nāmanabhaṭla kha 2 kuṁdanabhaṭla kha 1 dīniki
nēvvarēni vighnamācariṁccinavāru gaṁggekaṟtaṁ
gavila vadhiṁccinavāru vāraṇāsi vaccinavāru
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā Ō(yō)harēti vasuṁdhara saṣṭi
¨rvva¨rṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ
Digital edition of SII 40.226 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
